title: verbena bonariensis var. rigida
intro: Verbena bonariensis var. rigida, also known as Tall Verbena, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the Verbenaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Verbena bonariensis var. rigida include its ability to reduce stress, promote relaxation, and improve sleep quality, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and can also be used in herbal preparations such as salves, ointments, and creams to harness its medicinal properties.
